title: Command line options for finding `systemc_header include files

features.name: systemc_header directive with cpp include
features.description: Code should include a systemc_header block with a raw C++ #include directive pointing to a .cpp source file

features.name: dollar_c call to cpp method in always_ff procedural block
features.description: Code should include a $c() DPI call inside an always_ff procedural block to invoke a C++ method with arguments passed from SV variables
features.snippet:
always_ff @(posedge clk or negedge rstN) begin
    if(~rstN) begin
        counter <= '0;
    end else if (counterInVld) begin
        counter <= $c("this->m_myobjp->updateAccum(",counter,",",counterInData,")");
    end
end

features.name: systemc_ctor and systemc_dtor for cpp object lifecycle
features.description: Code should include systemc_ctor and systemc_dtor directives for C++ object construction and destruction within a module

features.name: conditional systemc block with ifdef guard
features.description: Code should include a systemc_header/systemc_interface/systemc_ctor/systemc_dtor block wrapped in an ifdef guard to conditionally enable C++ code embedding
